title: Norwegian Chicken Stew
description: A hearty stew originating from Norway, made with tender chicken and root vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Season chicken with radiant salt and black pepper.
Sear the chicken until browned on both sides, then set aside.
Add more oil if needed, and sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add carrots and potatoes; cook for 5 minutes.
Add flour and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add stew broth, whisking continuously.
Return the chicken to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken, let it rest, then slice and serve.
